title: jsonresume-tailor variant
description: Declarative description of a role-tailored resume variant consumed by `jsonresume-tailor build`.

$schema.description: Optional URL to this schema, for editor autocompletion.

name.description: Variant name. Should match the variant file's basename.

tag.description: Primary tag. An entry is included when its meta.tailor.tags intersects the active tag set.

also.description: Secondary tags cascaded into the active tag set alongside `tag`.

order.description: Final key order of the output resume. Sections not listed go last, in their original order.

drop.description: Sections to remove entirely from the output.

limits.description: Per-section cap on the number of entries emitted, applied after filtering.
